articles.title: The Time to Sell Bitcoin (BTC) Is Now, Says Peter Schiff
articles.description: Many cryptocurrencies including Bitcoin are trading at deep losses today. At the time of writing, some top coins including XRP, MATIC, and BNB, are all down by more than 5% in 24 hours, respectively. While BTC records a 7.88% loss in 24 hours, ETH is down by 8.89%. articles.title: Bitcoin Price Likely to See Low-End Target Of $9,000 — Chief Market Strategist Warns
articles.description: Bitcoin plunged to a three-week low Friday, freeing itself from a tight price squeeze that had seen it fluctuate between $22,500 and $22,200 since March 3.

articles.title: Developers will be free to fork Uniswap v3 protocol after BSL expires on April 1
articles.description: Uniswap v3 is set to become completely free for use as open source software after the expiration of its current business license April 1.

articles.title: Buy Signal? Bitcoin Investor Sentiment Falls To Lowest Level In Two Months
articles.description: Bitcoin and the broader crypto market took a hit over the last day, leading to bitcoin falling below $20,000 for the first time in two months. This decline was followed by a tremendous plunge in investor sentiment. The sharp decline saw sentiment drop to negative levels not seen since January. articles.title: Hedera confirms hackers stole tokens from DEXs, exploiting a bug in ‘smart contract service’
articles.description: The core team at Hedera reported that the attackers targeted liquidity pools on multiple decentralized exchanges (DEXs) to steal assets.

articles.title: Bitcoin Price Prediction as Bulls Hold BTC Above $19,500 – Where is BTC Heading Now?
articles.description: The world's top cryptocurrency, Bitcoin, has sharply declined, reaching its lowest value in two months. The second most valuable cryptocurrency, Ether, also experienced a similar downward trend in value. articles.title: KuCoin Faces Regulatory Heat Over the Sale of Unregistered Securities in New York
articles.description: New York state Attorney General Letitia James sued KuCoin for violating laws. The suit also lists ether as an unregistered security.

articles.title: Cardano Sheds 23% In Value As ADA Woes Pile Up – Here’s Why
articles.description: Cardano has found itself on rough terrain anew in the past few weeks, and barely able to hit its target, thus giving proponents and investors in the crypto some headaches. As a result of recent profit taking by intermediate-term investors, its value has fallen by 22% in the past 21 days. As a result, it has been one of the market’s worst-performing assets.
